dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 8562 IH: To designate a building of the Chancery of the United States in Pristina, Kosovo, as the “Eliot L. Engel Building”.
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Torres of New York (for himself, Mr. McCaul, Mr. Meeks, and Mr. Mast) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Foreign Affairs

form.official-title: To designate a building of the Chancery of the United States in Pristina, Kosovo, as the Eliot L. Engel Building.

section.text: The building of the Chancery of the United States located at Arberia, Nr.25 Rr. 4 KORRIKU in Pristina, Kosovo, shall be designated as the Eliot L. Engel Building.

Any reference in a law, map, regulation, document, paper, or other record of the United States to the building referred to in section 1 shall be deemed to be a reference to the Eliot L. Engel Building.
